title: NoFollow Attributes on Links

# NoFollow Attributes on Links

transcript.text: For the vast majority of websites no follow links are a complete waste of time
So usually just don't worry about them. I want to say usually like 90 plus percent of the time
Just don't worry about them. Okay, so if you don't know a note trying to figure a way to put this little burb
And no follow link tells Google that you don't want that link to pass any SEO authority
Okay, that's that's what it does
That's the only reason that link type exists so that you can link to something and not pass any authority
For most of you with websites, why would you link to something that you don't want to pass any authority to okay?
You passing authority does not change the amount of authority you have okay?
That's one concept and important to keep in mind
In the module. What is SEO how SEO authority is passed?
I talk a lot about this how authority is passed how no follow affects it or doesn't affect it
so if you want more information you can go check that out, but if you have
Five links it doesn't matter how many of them are no follow doesn't matter how many of our do follow
They all will pass the same amount of authority
So if you no follow for the links, it's not like the one that has a do follow passes more authority than if they were all do
Follow links, okay?
The authority passed by by your other links does not change
But whether you have no follow or do follow the only thing that no following the link does is
It does not pass authority to that
URL and really the external links that you have on your website are two trusted
Sources they're non-competitive. So there's no reason to not pass authority to them
There's no reason to not worry about the no follow and on your own website with internal links
You know you can't authority sculpt anyway
So there's no reason to add the no follow
Attribute to pretty much any link that you have on your website the exception of course is if you have paid blog
Postings or things like that where Google suggests that you no follow them
But I mean if if you're in this small exception where no no following makes sense
Then you probably know it. Okay, so if you don't know you're fine not worrying about it. Don't waste your time
